Variables.Name: LowerLeftCorner
Variables.Description: The lower left corner of the box.

Variables.Name: UpperRightCorner
Variables.Description: The upper right corner of the box.

Variables.Name: bAbsolute
Variables.Description: If true, the box coordinates are in world space.

Variables.Name: bKillInside
Variables.Description:
If true, particles INSIDE the box will be killed. 
	 	If false (the default), particles OUTSIDE the box will be killed.

Variables.Name: bAxisAlignedAndFixedSize
Variables.Description: If true, the box will always be axis aligned and non-scalable.
